segments.text_en: Inana adorns herself with the desert crown
evidence: She put the cu-gura, the desert crown, on her head.
her genitals were remarkable
She praised herself, full of delight at her genitals
when she went out to the shepherd, to the sheepfold

segments.text_en: Inana resolves to coax Enki at the abzu
evidence: I shall direct my steps to the abzu, to Eridug
I myself shall speak coaxingly to Enki, in the abzu, in Eridug
I shall utter a plea to the lord Enki
It shall never escape me that I have been neglected by him who has had sex.

segments.text_en: Inana journeys as Enki foresees her and instructs Isimud
evidence: the maiden Inana, holy Inana, directed her steps all by herself towards Enki's abzu in Eridug
who knows the divine powers in heaven and earth
knew all about her enterprise
Come here, my man, listen to my words.

segments.text_en: Enki orders a hospitable welcome with food and beer
evidence: offer her butter cake to eat
Pour beer for her, in front of the Lions Gate
make her feel as if she is in her girlfriend's house
You are to welcome holy Inana at the holy table, at the table of An.

segments.text_en: Isimud executes the welcome for Inana
evidence: He let the maiden into the abzu and Eridug
she got butter cake to eat
they gave her beer to drink, in front of the Lions Gate
He welcomed holy Inana at the holy table, at the table of An.

segments.text_en: Enki and Inana hold a drinking competition
evidence: Enki and Inana were drinking beer together in the abzu
enjoying the taste of sweet wine
the two of them started a competition
drinking from the bronze vessels of Urac

segments.text_en: Drunken Enki bestows the divine powers on Inana
evidence: I will give them to holy Inana, my daughter
Holy Inana received heroism, power, wickedness, righteousness
In the name of my power, in the name of my abzu
Holy Inana received deceit, the rebel lands, kindness

segments.text_en: Inana recounts the powers Enki has given her
evidence: He has given me righteousness. He has given me the plundering of cities.
He has given me deceit. He has given me the rebel lands.
He has given me wisdom. He has given me attentiveness.
He has given me strife. He has given me triumph. He has given me counselling.

segments.text_en: Enki sobers and finds the Boat of Heaven gone
evidence: holy Inana had gathered up the divine powers and embarked onto the Boat of Heaven
The Boat of Heaven had already left the quay
as the effects of the beer cleared from father Enki who had drunk beer
King Enki turned his attention to Eridug

segments.text_en: Enki inventories the powers, told each was given to his daughter
evidence: Where are the office of en priest, the office of lagal priest, divinity, the great and good crown, the royal throne?
My master has given them to his daughter.
Where are the noble sceptre, the staff and crook, the noble dress, shepherdship, kingship?
Where are the office of egi-zi priestess, the office of nin-dijir priestess, the office of icib priest, the office of lu-mah priest, the office of gudu priest?

segments.text_en: Fragmentary frog episode in Enki's house
evidence: By the bolt of the temple door, a frog spoke.
Enki grasped the frog by his right paw.
He gave ...... to the bird of heaven.
He gave ...... to the fish of the subterranean waters.

segments.text_en: Enki's repeated attempts to seize back the Boat of Heaven
evidence: The enkum are to take the Boat of Heaven away from her!
His important words cannot be countermanded.
How could my father have changed what he said to me?
So Inana got hold again of the divine powers which had been presented to her, and the Boat of Heaven
Come, my good minister of E-ana! My fair-spoken minister!

segments.text_en: The Boat of Heaven arrives at Unug amid rejoicing
evidence: today you have brought the Boat of Heaven to the Gate of Joy, to Unug Kulaba
Now there will be rejoicing in our city
The people shall stand in the street full of awe.
My people shall utter my praise.

segments.text_en: Enki tracks the boat and sends admiration
evidence: Where has the Boat of Heaven reached now?
It has just now reached the White Quay.
Isimud, my minister, my Sweet Name of Heaven!
Go now, ...... admiration.

segments.text_en: Enki enumerates all the powers Inana has brought to Unug
evidence: Inana, you have brought with you the office of en priest, you have brought with you the office of lagal priest
you have brought with you the great and good crown, you have brought with you the royal throne
you have brought with you sexual intercourse, you have brought with you kissing, you have brought with you prostitution
you have brought with you heroism, you have brought with you power, you have brought with you wickedness

segments.text_en: Inana names the places along the boat's route
evidence: she named it with the name "The house Ganzer is rebuilt"
she named that place with the name "Potsherds and scrap metal (?)"
she named that place with the name "White Quay"
she named that place with the name "Blue Quay"

segments.text_en: Enki establishes a rite for Inana and pronounces a blessing
evidence: In the name of my power, in the name of my abzu, I will establish ...... in my abzu for the woman.
Why has this one now entered here? ...... taking the divine powers from me?
May the citizens of your city, Inana, the citizens of Unug, live ......!
And as for you, Enki -- may ...... your city, Eridug
